Bash(osascript -e '
tell application "System Settings"
    activate
    reveal pane id "com.apple.ControlCenter-Settings.extension"
    delay 0.5
    reveal anchor "MenuBar" in pane id "com.apple.ControlCenter-Settings.extension"
end tell
delay 1.5
tell application "System Events"
    tell process "System Settings"
        set menuBarPopup to pop up button "Automatically hide and show the menu bar" of group 1 of scroll area 1 of group 1 of group 1 of splitter group 1 of group 1 of window 1
        click menuBarPopup
        delay 0.5
        click menu item "Always" of menu 1 of menuBarPopup
    end tell
end tell
delay 0.5
quit application "System Settings"' 2>&1)

Bash(osascript -e '
tell application "System Settings"
    activate
    reveal pane id "com.apple.ControlCenter-Settings.extension"
    delay 0.5
    reveal anchor "MenuBar" in pane id "com.apple.ControlCenter-Settings.extension"
end tell
delay 2
tell application "System Events"
    tell process "System Settings"
        set popups to every pop up button of every group of every scroll area of every group of every group of every splitter group of every group of window 1
        return popups
    end tell
end tell' 2>&1)

Bash(osascript -e '
tell application "System Settings"
    activate
    reveal pane id "com.apple.ControlCenter-Settings.extension"
    delay 0.5
    reveal anchor "MenuBar" in pane id "com.apple.ControlCenter-Settings.extension"
end tell
delay 1.5
tell application "System Events"
    tell process "System Settings"
        set menuBarPopup to pop up button "Automatically hide and show the menu bar" of group 1 of scroll area 1 of group 1 of group 3 of splitter group 1 of group 1 of window 1
        click menuBarPopup
        delay 0.5
        click menu item "Always" of menu 1 of menuBarPopup
    end tell
end tell
delay 0.5
quit application "System Settings"' 2>&1)

Bash(osascript -e '
tell application "Messages"
    activate
    reopen
end tell
delay 1
tell application "System Events"
    tell process "Messages"
        set position of window 1 to {100, 100}
    end tell
end tell')

Bash(yabai -m query --spaces | python3 -c "import json,sys; spaces=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'{len\(spaces\)} spaces'\); [print\(f'  space {s[\\"index\\"]}: {s[\\"type\\"]}'\) for s in spaces]")
Bash(yabai -m rule --add app="^Zed$" space=5 && open -a Zed)

Bash(yabai -m space 5 --label code && yabai -m query --spaces | python3 -c "import json,sys; spaces=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f'space {s[\\"index\\"]}: label=\\"{s[\\"label\\"]}\\"'\) for s in spaces]")
Bash(osascript -e 'tell application "Hammerspoon" to execute lua code "return hs.spaces.focusedSpace\(\)"' 2>&1)

Bash(osascript -e 'tell application "Hammerspoon" to execute lua code "local s = hs.spaces.focusedSpace\(\); local all = hs.spaces.spacesForScreen\(hs.screen.mainScreen\(\)\); local result = \\"focused=\\" .. tostring\(s\) .. \\" total=\\" .. #all; for i, sp in ipairs\(all\) do result = result .. \\" [\\" .. i .. \\"]=\\" .. tostring\(sp\) end; return result"' 2>&1)

Bash(osascript -e 'tell application "Hammerspoon" to execute lua code "if spaceMenu then return \\"title=\\" .. tostring\(spaceMenu:title\(\)\) .. \\" inMenuBar=\\" .. tostring\(spaceMenu:isInMenuBar\(\)\) else return \\"spaceMenu is nil\\" end"' 2>&1)

Bash(osascript -e 'tell application "Hammerspoon" to execute lua code "hs.reload\(\)"' 2>&1; sleep 2; osascript -e 'tell application "Hammerspoon" to execute lua code "if spaceMenu then return \\"title=\\" .. tostring\(spaceMenu:title\(\)\) .. \\" inMenuBar=\\" .. tostring\(spaceMenu:isInMenuBar\(\)\) else return \\"spaceMenu is nil\\" end"' 2>&1)

Bash(osascript -e 'tell application "Hammerspoon" to execute lua code "hs.reload\(\)"' 2>&1; sleep 3; osascript -e 'tell application "Hammerspoon" to execute lua code "if spaceMenu then return \\"title=\\" .. tostring\(spaceMenu:title\(\)\) .. \\" inMenuBar=\\" .. tostring\(spaceMenu:isInMenuBar\(\)\) else return \\"spaceMenu is nil\\" end"' 2>&1)
Bash(osascript -e 'tell application "Hammerspoon" to execute lua code "hs.reload\(\)"' 2>&1)

Bash(yabai -m query --windows --space 1 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "
import json,sys
windows=json.load\(sys.stdin\)
for w in windows:
    print\(f'{w[\\"app\\"]} - frame={w.get\(\\"frame\\",{}\)} has-focus={w.get\(\\"has-focus\\",False\)} subrole={w.get\(\\"subrole\\",\\"\\"\)} role={w.get\(\\"role\\",\\"\\"\)}'\)
")

Bash(yabai -m query --windows --space 1 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "
import json,sys
windows=json.load\(sys.stdin\)
for w in windows:
    print\(json.dumps\({k:v for k,v in w.items\(\)}, indent=2\)\)
" 2>&1 | head -40)
